subject: Question about Math assignment
body:
Dear Mr. Habimana,

I'm having trouble with the last problem on the calculus assignment. I've tried solving it using integration by parts but keep getting a different answer. Could you please provide some guidance or point me to a resource?

Thank you,
Marie Claire

subject: Re: Question about Math assignment
body:
Hi Marie Claire,

For problem 5, try using the substitution u = ln(x) first before applying integration by parts. This simplifies the integral significantly. Let me know if you need more clarification.

Best,
Mr. Habimana

subject: Re: Question about Math assignment
body:
Thank you! The substitution worked perfectly. I was able to solve it and got the correct answer.

Thanks again,
Marie Claire

subject: Missed class - need notes
body:
Dear Mr. Habimana,

I was unable to attend Monday's class due to illness. Could you please share the notes or slides from that session?

Regards,
Jean Baptiste

subject: Re: Missed class - need notes
body:
Hi Jean Baptiste,

Hope you're feeling better. I've uploaded the slides to the course portal. You can find them under the Materials section for Mathematics.

Take care,
Mr. Habimana

subject: Upcoming test reminder
body:
Dear Marie Claire,

This is a reminder that we have a quiz on differentiation next Tuesday. Please review chapters 4 and 5.

Best,
Mr. Habimana

subject: Grade inquiry - Midterm exam
body:
Dear Mr. Habimana,

I received my midterm grade and I believe there may have been an error in the scoring of question 3. Would it be possible to review my exam paper?

Thank you,
Emmanuel

subject: English essay submission
body:
Dear Ms. Mukamana,

I'm submitting my essay on post-colonial African literature. I've attached it to this message. Please let me know if you need any changes.

Best regards,
Alice Uwase

subject: Re: English essay submission
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for submitting your essay. I've reviewed it and your analysis of the themes is excellent. A few minor grammar corrections needed, which I've noted. Please check the comments.

Best,
Ms. Mukamana

subject: Office hours appointment
body:
Dear Ms. Mukamana,

Would you be available during your office hours on Thursday? I'd like to discuss my progress in the course.

Thanks,
David
